title: Verify functional equivalence + green gates (tsc, install-v2 suites, theme-parity, grep residue)
description: Final acceptance gate for W3-A. Confirm zero Ink/React residue (imports, files, deps), confirm the OutputRenderer seam and pipeline are intact, and run the green gates: pnpm -r exec tsc --noEmit, the full install-v2-* test suite, and theme-parity. This task verifies C-007 acceptance (deps removed + single stack + functional equivalence + parity green) for the install wizard. If any gate fails, report the exact failing gate and the minimal fix needed (do not expand scope into W3-B). No production code changes expected — verification + at most trivial fixes to keep gates green.
action: Run and confirm all of: (1) grep -rn for ink/react imports under packages/cli/src returns nothing; (2) find packages/cli/src/tui -name '*.tsx' returns nothing and InkOutputRenderer.ts is absent; (3) `grep -E '\"(ink|react|@types/react)\"\s*:' packages/cli/package.json` returns nothing but @clack/prompts + picocolors are still present; (4a) pipeline seam preserved: `git diff --quiet -- packages/cli/src/install/pipeline/pipeline.ts` exits 0; (4b) types.ts SEAM invariant: `git diff -- packages/cli/src/tui/types.ts` shows ONLY the `import type { ReactNode } from "react";` line + the dead `InkOutputRenderer extends OutputRenderer` interface block removed, with the `OutputRenderer` interface body byte-identical (do NOT use --quiet full-file pin on types.ts; also confirm grep 'from "react"' and grep 'InkOutputRenderer' in types.ts return nothing); (5) pnpm -r exec tsc --noEmit exits 0; (6) the install-v2-* suite passes: install-v2-dry-run, install-v2-hooks-stage, install-v2-pipeline, install-v2-guidance-dedupe, install-v2-preflight-stage; (7) packages/cli/__tests__/theme-parity.test.ts passes; (8) ink-react-compat.test.ts is absent; (9) EQUIVALENCE BAR check: the install wizard output holds content + wording + semantic color-role equivalence to the prior Ink rendering — NOT byte-identical glyphs/animation (box-drawing borders + live spinner animation are intentionally dropped, staying out of W3-B visual-redesign scope); assert via the green install-v2-pipeline contract + preserved OutputRenderer seam rather than per-glyph snapshots; (10) current branch is feat/w3a-ink-exit. Aggregate results into a pass/fail report per gate.

criteria: find packages/cli/src/tui -name '*.tsx' returns nothing AND packages/cli/src/tui/InkOutputRenderer.ts is absent
grep -E '\"(ink|react|@types/react)\"\s*:' packages/cli/package.json returns nothing AND grep finds both "@clack/prompts" and "picocolors"

types.ts SEAM invariant: git diff -- packages/cli/src/tui/types.ts shows ONLY the react-import line + the dead InkOutputRenderer interface block removed (OutputRenderer interface body byte-identical); grep 'from "react"' and grep 'InkOutputRenderer' in types.ts both return nothing. NOT a --quiet full-file pin on types.ts
pnpm --filter @fenglimg/fabric-cli test -- install-v2 passes (all 5 install-v2-* suites green)

EQUIVALENCE BAR: install wizard output holds content + wording + semantic color-role equivalence to prior Ink rendering (NOT byte-identical glyphs/animation; box borders + live spinner animation intentionally dropped, out of W3-B scope) — asserted via green install-v2-pipeline contract + preserved OutputRenderer seam, not per-glyph snapshots
convergence.verification: git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD; grep -rn "from \"ink\"\|from 'ink'\|from \"react\"\|from 'react'" packages/cli/src || echo NO_INK_REACT_IMPORTS; find packages/cli/src/tui -name '*.tsx'; test ! -e packages/cli/src/tui/InkOutputRenderer.ts && echo INK_RENDERER_GONE; test ! -e packages/cli/__tests__/ink-react-compat.test.ts && echo COMPAT_TEST_GONE; grep -E '\"(ink|react|@types/react)\"\s*:' packages/cli/package.json || echo NO_INK_REACT_DEPS; grep -E '\"@clack/prompts\"|\"picocolors\"' packages/cli/package.json; git diff --quiet -- packages/cli/src/install/pipeline/pipeline.ts && echo PIPELINE_UNCHANGED; git diff -- packages/cli/src/tui/types.ts && echo 'TYPES_DIFF_SHOWN (must be ONLY react import + dead InkOutputRenderer interface removed; OutputRenderer body byte-identical)'; grep -n 'from "react"\|InkOutputRenderer' packages/cli/src/tui/types.ts || echo TYPES_NO_REACT_NO_INKRENDERER; pnpm -r exec tsc --noEmit && pnpm --filter @fenglimg/fabric-cli test -- install-v2 && pnpm --filter @fenglimg/fabric-cli test -- theme-parity
convergence.definition_of_done: W3-A acceptance proven: the install wizard runs on the single theme.ts + @clack stack with ink/react fully removed, functional equivalence held behind the unchanged OutputRenderer seam, and tsc + install-v2-* + theme-parity all green on branch feat/w3a-ink-exit.

files.change: Confirm passes unchanged (renderer interface preserved); no edit unless a genuine equivalence gap is found
Confirm passes (theme.ts API not edited in W3-A)

implementation: Run the grep/find/package.json residue checks (incl. @types/react in the dep grep) and record pass/fail per gate.

Run git diff --quiet on pipeline.ts (byte-unchanged) and git diff (non-quiet) on types.ts to confirm the SEAM invariant: only the react import + dead InkOutputRenderer interface removed, OutputRenderer body byte-identical; also grep types.ts has no react import / no InkOutputRenderer.
Run pnpm --filter @fenglimg/fabric-cli test -- install-v2 (all 5 suites) and pnpm --filter @fenglimg/fabric-cli test -- theme-parity.
If any gate fails, report the exact gate + minimal fix scoped to W3-A only (do NOT pull in colors.ts / @clack theming / snapshot infra — those are W3-B). Re-run until all gates green.
Emit a final per-gate pass/fail summary.

success_metrics: pipeline.ts byte-unchanged; types.ts diff limited to react-import + dead InkOutputRenderer interface, OutputRenderer body byte-identical
equivalence bar met: content + wording + semantic color-role equivalence (not byte-identical glyphs/animation)

reference.pattern: Grep-verifiable acceptance gate + green test suites (local tsc gate per project memory to prevent CI relapse)

rationale.chosen_approach: A dedicated verification task converts the C-007 acceptance criteria into mechanical, grep/test-checkable gates run after deletion, catching residue or regressions before merge; local tsc gate per project memory prevents CI relapse.
decision_factors: C-007: deps removed + single stack + functional equivalence + parity green
Project memory: local pnpm -r exec tsc --noEmit prevents CI tsc relapse
Seam-unchanged diff check (pipeline byte-pinned + OutputRenderer body byte-identical in types.ts) is the cheapest proof functional equivalence was held
Equivalence bar is content + wording + semantic color-role, NOT byte-identical glyphs/animation — so the gate is the green install-v2-pipeline contract, not per-glyph snapshots (which would be W3-B)
rationale.tradeoffs: Functional equivalence beyond the interface/test level is asserted via preserved seam + passing suites rather than per-surface snapshots (snapshot infra is explicitly W3-B). types.ts is no longer fully byte-pinned: the narrower OutputRenderer-body-byte-identical invariant replaces the prior --quiet full-file pin so the dead react import/interface removal in TASK-002 does not trip this gate.

risks: If a gate reveals a real equivalence gap, the fix must stay W3-A-scoped; resist pulling in W3-B work (colors.ts, @clack theming, snapshots).
